issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead

issue.errorLine1: <string name="study_unit_detail">共 %1$d 词 | 到期 %2$d | 新词 %3$d</string>
<string name="settings_word_note_desc">在普通背词与头脑风暴的预答案界面展示单词便签输入框。你补充的关联词会被提升为强关联，缺边时会加入后台词池整理。</string>
<string name="settings_app_locale_desc">选择应用界面语言，更改后需要重启应用生效。</string>
<string name="settings_provider_desc">管理不同的 AI 服务提供商，支持 OpenAI 兼容与 Anthropic 格式。</string>
<string name="settings_provider_name_hint">例如: OpenAI 国内节点</string>
<string name="settings_base_url_hint">本地服务可使用 http://IP:端口</string>
<string name="settings_model_scopes_desc">为不同功能选择提供商与模型，支持手动输入模型或从接口拉取列表。</string>

<string name="scope_main_details">使用场景：
· 单词 AI 整理（自动填充音标、释义、词根拆解、近义词等）
· 文章段落 AI 翻译
· 文章段落 AI 分析（语法点、关键词汇、句子拆解）
· 题库 AI 答案生成与解析
· 后台批量任务（单词整理、答案生成等）

注意：出题功能已独立为「出题模型」作用域。</string>

<string name="scope_fast_details">使用场景：
· 文章适配度评分（评估是否适合考研出题，0-100 分）
· 在线文章批量评分（后台任务）
· 题库翻译评分（逐句对比参考译文）
· 题库写作批改（五档评分 + 扣分明细）
· 文章生词快速分析
· 即时查词与词链高亮

建议选用响应快、成本低的模型。</string>

<string name="scope_ocr_details">使用场景：
· 拍照批量导入单词（识别手写/印刷体）
· 试卷扫描识别（题型、文章、题目、选项）
· 答案页扫描提取
· 文章 OCR 录入（拍照提取标题、正文）

需要支持视觉/多模态输入的模型。</string>

<string name="scope_pool_details">使用场景：
· 质量优先模式词池构建（逐词 AI 精确比对）
· 词池条目类型分类

构建途中可在此处热切换模型，下一个请求即生效。</string>

<string name="scope_article_details">使用场景：
· 文章段落 AI 分析（中文翻译、语法点、关键词汇、句子拆解）

与主模型的段落分析共用，但可独立配置以使用更适合长文理解的模型。</string>

<string name="scope_search_details">使用场景：
· 阅读理解来源验证（联网搜索原文出处）
· 范文检索（搜索模型范文与链接）
· 单词整理增强模式的参考检索（当参考来源选'搜索模型'时）

需要支持联网搜索/工具调用的模型。</string>

<string name="scope_reviewer_details">使用场景：
· 词池边质量提纯
· 劣质关系降权

作为独立手动任务触发，不重建词池。</string>

<string name="scope_question_generate_details">使用场景：
· 阅读理解出题（5 题 · 400-500 词）
· 完形填空出题（20 空 · 280-360 词）
· 翻译题出题（英语一/二）
· 写作出题（小作文/大作文）
· 新题型出题（段落排序/句子插入/匹配题）

需要支持长文本理解和复杂推理的模型。</string>
<string name="settings_model_advanced_desc">高级调试与解析选项，影响所有模型请求。</string>
<string name="settings_debug_mode_desc">开启后每次 AI 请求都会弹窗展示 JSON。</string>
<string name="settings_response_unwrap_desc">当服务返回完整响应 JSON 时自动提取内容。</string>
<string name="settings_json_repair_desc">检测到未转义引号等错误时自动修复再解析。</string>
<string name="settings_image_compress_desc">自动压缩 OCR/扫描图片以减少请求体积，默认约 1MB。</string>
<string name="settings_bg_task_desc">查看与管理后台整理、题库答案生成等任务，并控制后台并发。</string>
<string name="settings_bg_concurrency_hint">建议 2-4，过高可能挤占 OCR 与朗读资源</string>
<string name="settings_auto_scan_desc">扫描在线文章源（Guardian/The Atlantic/CS Monitor），自动评估是否适合考研出题。已评分且未过期的文章会被跳过。</string>
<string name="settings_rescore_hint">已评分文章在此间隔内不会重复评分，建议 24-168</string>
<string name="settings_tts_desc">使用系统 TTS 朗读单词与文章，可调整语速与音调。</string>
<string name="settings_tts_auto_study_desc">每弹出一个单词自动播放发音。</string>
<string name="settings_tts_prewarm_desc">控制段落缓存的并发与重试次数。</string>
<string name="settings_brainstorm_desc">「头脑风暴」模式按词与词的关联关系成片选词、排序。下面两项在下次「开始学习」时生效。</string>
<string name="settings_cluster_size_desc">每个连贯小簇最多包含几个相关词。越大越「成片」背诵（同义/反义/形近/同根集中出现），越小越分散。</string>
<string name="settings_quality_threshold_desc">只有 AI 置信度不低于此值的关联边才参与选词与展示。调高更精准（关联更可靠但更少），调低更丰富（关联更多但可能带噪声）。</string>
<string name="settings_active_recall_desc">开启后，对有明确近义 / 反义 / 易混关联的词出选择题：从同组词中选出正确关联词。答对记为「良好」，答错记为「重来」并稍后重现。用主动检索强化记忆。</string>
<string name="settings_provider_not_used">该提供商未被任何作用域使用。</string>
<string name="settings_delete_fallback">删除后会自动回退到默认提供商。%s</string>
<string name="cloud_sync_settings_desc">开启后，设置项会同步到单独的 GitHub 仓库。</string>
<string name="cloud_sync_settings_note">配置同步使用同一 GitHub 账号与 Token，但必须使用独立仓库。出于安全考虑，GitHub Token 与 AI API Key 不会同步。</string>
<string name="cloud_sync_confirm_msg">将与云端数据智能合并（新增的词汇/文章会被添加，修改过的内容保留更新的版本）。确定继续？</string>
<string name="cloud_force_upload_confirm">将用本地数据完全覆盖云端。确定？</string>
<string name="cloud_force_download_confirm">将用云端数据完全覆盖本地，本地独有的数据会丢失。确定？</string>
<string name="article_basic_info_desc">先填写标题、来源和封面，便于后续列表展示与分类。</string>
<string name="article_body_structure_desc">段落会按当前顺序保存；可逐段插图，也可以直接粘贴全文后再细调。</string>
<string name="article_body_hint">正文段落将按下方顺序逐项渲染，长文也能保持流畅编辑。</string>
<string name="article_ocr_desc">适合从试卷、截图或扫描件快速提取文章内容。</string>
<string name="article_analysis_expand">点击展开逐句翻译、语法和重点词汇</string>
<string name="article_notebook_empty_hint">点击文章中的非词库词即可收集到此处</string>
<string name="article_filter_hint_not_configured">先配置条件，再用右侧按钮决定是否启用。</string>
<string name="article_filter_hint_active">当前筛选已生效，只影响当前可见文章。</string>
<string name="pool_overview_view_full">查看全图（拖动 / 缩放浏览全部词）</string>
<string name="data_sync_pool_focus_invalid">词池策略 %s 的焦点词不存在，无法安全同步。</string>
<string name="question_confirm_delete_message">删除该题组及其所有题目和做题记录？</string>
<string name="scan_confidence_warning">识别置信度较低（%d%%），请核对扫描结果</string>
<string name="scan_source_not_identified">来源未识别，保存后可手动补充</string>
<string name="reader_options_hint_opinion">支持两种格式：每行一个观点，或一行粘贴 A. B. C. 格式（共 7 个）</string>
<string name="reader_options_hint_subheading">支持两种格式：每行一个标题，或一行粘贴 A. B. C. 格式（共 7 个）</string>
<string name="reader_options_hint_info">支持两种格式：每行一个信息，或一行粘贴 A. B. C. 格式（共 7 个）</string>
<string name="reader_options_hint_sentence">支持两种格式：每行一个句子，或一行粘贴 A. B. C. 格式（共 7 个）</string>
<string name="import_dict_desc">从 JSON 文件导入词书和单词数据</string>
<string name="import_plan_desc">从 JSON 文件导入计划模板、任务进度和自动记录</string>
<string name="export_plan_desc">导出当前计划模板、任务进度和自动打卡日志</string>
<string name="guardian_filter_hint">自动评估只会作用于当前已筛出的文章；已评过的文章不会重复评估。</string>
<string name="guardian_load_failed_msg">当前栏目暂时无法读取文章，可以刷新或切换其他来源与栏目。</string>
<string name="guardian_scope_desc">把来源和栏目都收进这里，主列表只保留真正需要阅读的内容。</string>
<string name="guardian_desc_guardian">新闻覆盖广，适合筛选高频考研题源。</string>
<string name="guardian_desc_csmonitor">分析性更强，议题集中，适合练习深度阅读。</string>
<string name="guardian_desc_atlantic">篇幅更长，评论性更强，适合高阶素材积累。</string>
<string name="guardian_empty_has_source_msg">可以先放宽来源与栏目，或关闭筛选条件，再决定要保留哪一批文章。</string>
<string name="guardian_empty_no_source_msg">尝试切换到其他来源或栏目，系统会在进入列表后自动评估当前可见文章。</string>
<string name="unit_empty_hint">单元中还没有单词\n点击 + 添加单词</string>
<string name="unit_remove_word_confirm">确定要从此单元移除「%s」吗？（不会删除单词本身）</string>
<string name="unit_delete_confirm">确定要删除单元「%s」吗？（不会删除单词本身）</string>
<string name="quick_search_ask_desc">随时询问词义、语法、翻译、写作或阅读问题</string>
<string name="pool_review_switch_hint">切换后从下一次请求生效；全局保留。</string>
<string name="pool_review_chunk_summary">共 %1$d 批，已完成 %2$d 批，%3$s</string>
<string name="pool_review_no_provider">暂无提供商，请先到设置中添加。</string>
<string name="pool_review_no_apikey">该提供商未配置 API Key，切换后提纯请求会失败，请先到设置中配置。</string>
<string name="pool_review_switch_global">切换会写入全局「词池提纯」模型并保留；提纯途中切换从下一次请求（含失败重试）生效。</string>
<string name="batch_import_selected_images">已选 %d 张图片，点击添加更多</string>
<string name="batch_import_conditions">提取条件（识别单词模式必填）</string>
<string name="batch_import_conditions_hint">如：蓝色字体、黑体、标题中的词</string>
<string name="batch_import_full_scan_optional">可选。留空时将扫描全部可见英文单词。</string>
<string name="batch_import_full_scan_desc">完全扫描会额外提取每个词在图片中的关联片段，并在后台整理时作为参考。</string>
<string name="batch_import_word_list_desc">识别单词仅返回词列表，速度更快。</string>
<string name="batch_import_extract_result">提取到 %1$d 个单词（已选 %2$d 个）</string>

issue.message: "in Folge" is a common misspelling; did you mean "infolge"?
"referencia" is a common misspelling; did you mean "referência"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="data_sync_missing_dict_file">O manifesto da nuvem referencia arquivo de dicionário ausente: %s</string>

issue.message: "referencia" is a common misspelling; did you mean "referência"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="data_sync_missing_dict_index">O manifesto da nuvem referencia índice de dicionário ausente: %s</string>

issue.message: "referencia" is a common misspelling; did you mean "referência"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="data_sync_pool_strategy_invalid">Estratégia de pool %s referencia palavras inexistentes, não é possível sincronizar com segurança.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("words"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("words"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("words"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("selected"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dict_batch_delete_confirm">Delete %d selected words? This cannot be undone.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("words"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="dict_qf_confirm_detail">This will send one AI request per word for %d words</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("tokens"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("tokens"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("Online"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("words"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("relations"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("articles"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("new"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("returned"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="data_pool_build_stopped">Pool build stopped: word \"%1$s\" group %2$d/%3$d returned invalid data after %4$d attempts.\nReason: %5$s\nProgress saved. Check AI service/model config and retry.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("times"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("candidate"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("semantic"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("groups"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("groups"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("entry"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Using `setJavaScriptEnabled` can introduce XSS vulnerabilities into your application, review carefully
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.

issue.errorLine1:
<string name="scope_fast_details">使用场景：
· 文章适配度评分（评估是否适合考研出题，0-100 分）
· 在线文章批量评分（后台任务）
· 题库翻译评分（逐句对比参考译文）
· 题库写作批改（五档评分 + 扣分明细）
· 文章生词快速分析
· 即时查词与词链高亮

建议选用响应快、成本低的模型。</string>

<string name="scope_question_generate_details">使用场景：
· 阅读理解出题（5 题 · 400-500 词）
· 完形填空出题（20 空 · 280-360 词）
· 翻译题出题（英语一/二）
· 写作出题（小作文/大作文）
· 新题型出题（段落排序/句子插入/匹配题）

需要支持长文本理解和复杂推理的模型。</string>
<string name="settings_bg_concurrency_hint">建议 2-4，过高可能挤占 OCR 与朗读资源</string>
<string name="settings_rescore_hint">已评分文章在此间隔内不会重复评分，建议 24-168</string>

issue.message: Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icons should not fill every pixel of their square region; see the design guide for details
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
Launcher icon used as round icon did not have a circular shape
The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png
The following unrelated icon files have identical contents: ic_launcher.png, ic_launcher_round.png
Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val displayFormat = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm", Locale.getDefault())
